RURIMEGU-KAHO_DEFEND.title: Defend
RURIMEGU-KAHO_STRIKE.title: Strike
RURIMEGU-SPECIAL_THANKS.title: Special Thanks
RURIMEGU-SPECIAL_THANKS.description: Draw {Cards:diff()} card. [gold]Backstage[/gold]: whenever you play an Attack, [gold]Burst[/gold] {RURIMEGU-BURST:diff()}.
RURIMEGU-BUDDING_PREMONITION.title: Budding Premonition
RURIMEGU-BUDDING_PREMONITION.description: Increase max ❤️ by {RURIMEGU-EXPAND_HEARTS:diff()}. Deal damage equal to your current max ❤️.
RURIMEGU-FINAL_APPEAL.title: Final Appeal
RURIMEGU-FINAL_APPEAL.description: Deal damage equal to your current ❤️. Lose all ❤️.
RURIMEGU-TRAINING_OUTCOMES.title: Training Outcomes
RURIMEGU-TRAINING_OUTCOMES.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. [gold]Backstage[/gold]: whenever you [gold]Collect[/gold], this card costs 1 less energy next time it is played.
RURIMEGU-KAHO_SMASH.title: Kaho Smash
RURIMEGU-FANTASY375.title: 37.5°C's Fantasy
RURIMEGU-FANTASY375.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Your next Skill card costs {CostReduction:diff()} less energy this turn.
RURIMEGU-STEP_UP.title: Step Up!
RURIMEGU-BUNNY_PYON_PYON.title: Bunny Pyon Pyon
RURIMEGU-BUNNY_PYON_PYON.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. [gold]Burst[/gold] equal to the damage dealt.
RURIMEGU-CERISE_BOUQUET.title: Cerise Bouquet
RURIMEGU-CERISE_BOUQUET.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies 3 times.
RURIMEGU-SPRING_BREEZE_SWING.title: Spring Breeze Swing
RURIMEGU-SPRING_BREEZE_SWING.description: Draw {Cards:diff()} card. [gold]Backstage[/gold]: whenever [gold]Burst[/gold] reaches your ❤️ limit, gain 1 Energy.
RURIMEGU-BUNNY_DEFEND.title: Bunny Defend
RURIMEGU-BUNNY_DEFEND.description: Gain Block equal to your current max ❤️.
RURIMEGU-GENYOU_YAKOU.title: Genyou Yakou
RURIMEGU-GENYOU_YAKOU.description: If you have 10 or more ❤️, draw {Cards:diff()} cards. [gold]Collect[/gold].
RURIMEGU-ZANYOU.title: Zanyou
RURIMEGU-NEW_BLACK.title: Nεw Black
RURIMEGU-NEW_BLACK.description: Draw {Cards:diff()} card. [gold]Backstage[/gold]: for every 6 [gold]Burst[/gold] Hearts, gain {Block:diff()} Block. (Current: {NEW_BLACK_TRACKER})
RURIMEGU-CURTAIN_CALL.title: Curtain Call
RURIMEGU-FULL_OF_POWER.title: Full of Power
RURIMEGU-AGILE_STEPS.title: Agile Steps
RURIMEGU-AGILE_STEPS.description: [gold]Burst[/gold] {RURIMEGU-BURST:diff()}. Your next Attack card costs 1 less Energy.
RURIMEGU-LOVE_IT.title: Love it!
RURIMEGU-MIX_SHAKE.title: Mix shake!!
RURIMEGU-MIX_SHAKE.description: Gain {Block:diff()} Block. Triggers once more for every 10 ❤️ you have.
RURIMEGU-FAN_SERVICE.title: Fan Service
RURIMEGU-FAN_SERVICE.description: [gold]Collect[/gold]. The damage from Collect also hits 1 additional random enemy.
RURIMEGU-GLOWING_ROUTINE.title: Glowing Routine
RURIMEGU-GLOWING_ROUTINE.description: At the start of your turn, [gold]Burst[/gold] {RURIMEGU-BURST:diff()}.
